comment: Handles an STMessage for AiEventClassTy. Maps the external message ID to an internal AI event trigger, finds matching event records, evaluates their conditions, and interprets their action lists.

expected_signature: int __thiscall FUN_0065bd70(void * this, int param_1, int param_2)
comment: Maps STMessage.id to an internal AI event trigger and optionally populates the event context from the message payload. Name is descriptive; original spelling is not confirmed.
